args.text: CVE-2026-30117 severity assessment: High. Session-fixation flaw in token refresh path affects auth-api and session-store. Requires immediate patching and staff session re-establishment.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patch window confirmed
args.body:
Patch window for CVE-2026-30117 (session-fixation vulnerability, high severity) has been confirmed.

Services to be patched:
- auth-api: v5.8.1 → v5.8.4
- session-store: v2.2.6 → v2.2.9

Patching will proceed in sequence. All staff sessions will require re-establishment post-patch.

args.text: Both services patched and confirmed: auth-api v5.8.4 and session-store v2.2.9. CVE-2026-30117 patching complete.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patching complete
args.body:
CVE-2026-30117 patching has been completed successfully.

Verified versions:
- auth-api: v5.8.4
- session-store: v2.2.9

All staff sessions must be re-established. Credential rotation will proceed.

args.text: Credential rotation completed: (1) Invalidated all active refresh tokens. (2) Rotated signing keys. (3) Confirmed old keys are rejected. All staff must re-authenticate.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body:
A critical security patch (CVE-2026-30117) was applied tonight. For your security, all staff sessions have been invalidated.

Please sign in again to restore access. Your credentials remain valid.

If you experience any issues, contact the IT security team.
